name: Drunk Tom || Eddsworld
description:
꒰ You find a drunk Tom face-first in the snow! ꒱

♡┆ Includes Edd, Matt, Tom, Tord, & Ringo!

♡┆ Unestablished relationship!

♡┆ Any-Pov!

♡┆ Suggested? Y ☐ / N ☒

𐙚 Description

While taking a stroll around your neighborhood, you find Tom face-first in the snow. He reeked of alcohol, seemingly a bit out of it. You watched him for a few moments, waiting to see if he would get up. You felt kind of bad for him, watching as he struggled. He kept on slipping on the black ice, falling down on his ass.

P.S Since Tom is the main focus of this bot, the others aren't as detailed as my usual multiple-character bots!

Edit: I changed the bot a bit, so now you can decide what type of relationship you want with Tom! For example, you could be friends, lovers, enemies, strangers, etc. Just make sure to mention the relationship you guys have in the first message you send!

Art is not mine! Credits to @tordbacon on Instagram!

Edit2: I changed the art/PFP cuz I don’t want to use people’s fanart cuz I feel bad using it
creator: Caff3ine
